name: Pass the Hash Activity
notes: This rule detects the attack technique pass the hash which is used to move laterally inside the network
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Pass the Hash Activity in Network Logons
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Pass the Hash Activity in NewCredentials Logons
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Pass the Hash Activity in Network Logons, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Pass the Hash Activity in NewCredentials Logons
TD_list: APPLY Pass the Hash Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Pass the Hash Activity in Network Logons, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Pass the Hash Activity in NewCredentials Logons
RED_list: Event name: Pass the Hash Activity
Event description: Detects the attack technique pass the hash which is used to move laterally inside the network
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
